data.name: IDS_TIPS_GAMETIP_0
data.value: NOT USED

data.name: IDS_TIPS_GAMETIP_1
data.value: You can use the touchscreen on the PlayStation®Vita system to navigate menus!

data.name: IDS_TIPS_GAMETIP_48
data.value: minecraftforum has a section dedicated to the PlayStation®Vita Edition.

data.name: IDS_TIPS_GAMETIP_44
data.value: You'll get the latest info on this game from @4JStudios and @Kappische on twitter!

data.name: IDS_TIPS_GAMETIP_45
data.value: Don't look an Enderman in the eye!

data.name: IDS_TIPS_TRIVIA_4
data.value: We think 4J Studios has removed Herobrine from the PlayStation®Vita system game, but we're not too sure.

data.name: IDS_TIPS_TRIVIA_17
data.value: Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition broke lots of records!

data.name: IDS_HOW_TO_PLAY_MULTIPLAYER
IDS_HOW_TO_PLAY_SOCIALMEDIA
IDS_HOW_TO_PLAY_CREATIVE
IDS_TUTORIAL_TASK_FLY
data.value: Pressing{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_JUMP*} twice quickly will allow you to fly. To exit flying, repeat the action. To fly faster, push{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_MOVE*} forward twice in rapid succession while flying. When in flying mode, you can hold down{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_JUMP*} to move up and{*CONTROLLER_ACTION_SNEAK*} to move down, or use the directional buttons to move up, down, left or right.

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_SELECTDEVICE
data.value: NOT USED

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_CHANGEDEVICE
data.value: NOT USED

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_VIEW_GAMERCARD
data.value: "NOT USED"

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_VIEW_GAMERPROFILE
data.value: "NOT USED"

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_INVITE_PARTY
data.value: Invite Friends

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_START_CREATIVE
data.value: If you create, load or save a world in Creative Mode, that world will have trophies and leaderboard updates disabled, even if it is then loaded in Survival Mode. Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_START_SAVEDINCREATIVE
data.value: This world has previously been saved in Creative Mode, and it will have trophies and leaderboard updates disabled. Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_START_SAVEDINCREATIVE_CONTINUE
data.value: This world has previously been saved in Creative Mode, and it will have trophies and leaderboard updates disabled.

data.name: IDS_CONFIRM_START_HOST_PRIVILEGES
data.value: If you create, load or save a world with Host Privileges enabled, that world will have trophies and leaderboard updates disabled, even if it is then loaded with those options off. Are you sure you want to continue?

data.name: IDS_CONNECTION_LOST_LIVE
data.value: Connection to "PSN" was lost. Exiting to the main menu.

data.name: IDS_CONNECTION_LOST_LIVE_NO_EXIT
data.value: Connection to "PSN" was lost.

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_ACHIEVEMENT_TEXT
data.value: This is the Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition trial game. If you had the full game, you would just have earned a trophy! Unlock the full game to experience the joy of Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition and to play with your friends across the globe through "PSN". Would you like to unlock the full game?

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_THEME_TEXT
data.value: This is the Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition trial game. If you had the full game, you would just have earned a theme! Unlock the full game to experience the joy of Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition and to play with your friends across the globe through "PSN". Would you like to unlock the full game?

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_ACCEPT_INVITE
data.value: This is the Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition trial game. You need the full game to be able to accept this invite. Would you like to unlock the full game?

data.name: IDS_UNLOCK_GUEST_TEXT
data.value: Guest players cannot unlock the full game. Please sign in with a Sony Entertainment Network account.

data.name: IDS_LEADERBOARD_GAMERTAG
data.value: Online ID

data.name: IDS_GROUPNAME_POTIONS_480
data.value: Brewing

data.name: IDS_RETURNEDTOTITLESCREEN_TEXT
data.value: You have been returned to the title screen because you have been signed out of the "PSN".

data.name: IDS_TRIALOVER_TEXT
data.value: You've been playing the Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition Trial Game for the maximum time allowed! To continue the fun, would you like to unlock the full game?

data.name: IDS_FATAL_ERROR_TEXT
data.value: "Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition" has failed to load, and cannot continue.

data.name: IDS_NO_MULTIPLAYER_PRIVILEGE_JOIN_TEXT
data.value: Failed to join the game as one or more players are not allowed to play Online due to their Sony Entertainment Network account chat restrictions.

data.name: IDS_NO_MULTIPLAYER_PRIVILEGE_HOST_TEXT
data.value: Failed to create an online game as one or more players are not allowed to play Online due to their Sony Entertainment Network account chat restrictions. Uncheck the "Online Game" box in "More Options" to start an offline game.

data.name: IDS_NO_USER_CREATED_CONTENT_PRIVILEGE_SINGLE_LOCAL
data.value: You are not allowed to join this game session because Online is disabled on your Sony Entertainment Network account due to chat restrictions.

data.name: IDS_NO_USER_CREATED_CONTENT_PRIVILEGE_ALL_LOCAL
data.value: You are not allowed to join this game session because one of your local players has Online disabled on their Sony Entertainment Network account due to chat restrictions. Uncheck the "Online Game" box in "More Options" to start an offline game.

data.name: IDS_NO_USER_CREATED_CONTENT_PRIVILEGE_CREATE
data.value: You are not allowed to create this game session because one of your local players has Online disabled on their Sony Entertainment Network account due to chat restrictions. Uncheck the "Online Game" box in "More Options" to start an offline game.

data.name: IDS_SAVE_ICON_MESSAGE
data.value: This game has a level autosave feature. When you see the icon above displayed, the game is saving your data. Please do not turn off your PlayStation®Vita system while this icon is on-screen.

data.name: IDS_GAMEOPTION_HOST_PRIVILEGES
data.value: When enabled, the host can toggle their ability to fly, disable exhaustion, and make themselves invisible from the in-game menu. Disables trophies and leaderboard updates.

data.name: IDS_CHECKBOX_DISPLAY_SPLITSCREENGAMERTAGS
data.value: Splitscreen Online ID's

data.name: IDS_ACHIEVEMENTS
data.value: Trophies

data.name: IDS_LABEL_GAMERTAGS
data.value: Online ID's:

data.name: IDS_IN_GAME_GAMERTAGS
data.value: In-Game Online ID's

data.name: IDS_SOCIAL_DEFAULT_DESCRIPTION
data.value: Look what I made in Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition!

data.name: IDS_USING_TRIAL_TEXUREPACK_WARNING
data.value: You are using the trial version of a texture pack. You will have access to the full contents of the texture pack, but you will not be able to save your progress. If you try to save while using the trial version, you will be given the option to purchase the full version.

data.name: IDS_TITLE_UPDATE_NAME
data.value: Patch 1.04 (Title Update 14)

data.name: IDS_BACK_BUTTON
data.value: SELECT

data.name: IDS_HOST_OPTION_DISABLES_ACHIEVEMENTS
data.value: This option disables trophies and leaderboard updates for this world while playing, and if loading it again after saving with this option on.

data.name: IDS_SIGNIN_PSN
data.value: Would you like to sign in to the "PSN"?

data.name: IDS_KICK_PLAYER_DESCRIPTION
data.value: For players that are not on the same PlayStation®Vita system as the host player, selecting this option will kick the player from the game and any other players on their PlayStation®Vita system. This player will not be able to rejoin the game until it is restarted.

data.name: IDS_PLATFORM_NAME
data.value: PlayStation®Vita

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIP_CHANGE_NETWORK_MODE
data.value: Change Network Mode

data.name: IDS_SELECT_NETWORK_MODE_TITLE
data.value: Select Network Mode

data.name: IDS_SELECT_NETWORK_MODE_TEXT
data.value: Choose Ad Hoc Network to connect with other PlayStation®Vita systems nearby, or "PSN" to connect with friends all over the world.

data.name: IDS_NETWORK_ADHOC
data.value: Ad Hoc Network

data.name: IDS__NETWORK_PSN
data.value: "PSN"

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_SAVETRANSFER_DOWNLOAD
data.value: Download PS3™ Save

data.name: IDS_TOOLTIPS_SAVETRANSFER_UPLOAD
data.value: Upload Save for PS3™/PS4™

data.name: IDS_CANCEL_UPLOAD_TITLE
data.value: Upload Canceled

data.name: IDS_CANCEL_UPLOAD_TEXT
data.value: You have canceled uploading this save to the save transfer area.

data.name: IDS_SAVETRANSFER_STAGE_PUT_DATA
data.value: Uploading data : %d%%

data.name: IDS_SAVETRANSFER_STAGE_GET_DATA
data.value: Downloading data : %d%%

data.name: IDS_SAVE_TRANSFER_TEXT
data.value: Are you sure you would like to upload this save, and overwrite any current save held in the save transfer area?

data.name: IDS_SAVETRANSFER_STAGE_CONVERTING
data.value: Converting Data

data.name: IDS_SAVETRANSFER_STAGE_SAVING
data.value: Saving

data.name: IDS_SAVE_TRANSFER_UPLOADCOMPLETE
data.value: Upload Complete!

data.name: IDS_SAVE_TRANSFER_UPLOADFAILED
data.value: Upload Failed. Please try again later.

data.name: IDS_SAVE_TRANSFER_DOWNLOADCOMPLETE
data.value: Download Complete!

data.name: IDS_SAVE_TRANSFER_DOWNLOADFAILED
data.value: Download Failed. Please try again later.

data.name: IDS_DISCONNECTED_NAT_TYPE_MISMATCH
data.value: Failed to join the game due to a restrictive NAT type. Please check your network settings.

data.name: IDS_SAVE_TRANSFER_NOT_AVAILABLE_TEXT
data.value: There is no save available in the save transfer area at the moment. You can upload a world save to the save transfer area using Minecraft: PlayStation®3 Edition, and then download it with Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition.

data.name: IDS_SAVE_TRANSFER_WRONG_VERSION
data.value: The save file in the save transfer area has a version number that Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition doesn't support yet.

data.name: IDS_SAVE_INCOMPLETE_TITLE
data.value: Saving incomplete

data.name: IDS_SAVE_INCOMPLETE_EXPLANATION_QUOTA
data.value: Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition is out of space for save data. To make room, delete other Minecraft: PlayStation®Vita Edition saves.
